subcategory: interactive time-series area chart with brush selection
use_cases: Interactive time-series data exploration with zoom capabilities via brush selection
Stock market or financial analytics dashboards showing price movements over time
Range filtering for selecting subsets of temporal data for detailed analysis
Data exploration tools where users need to drill down into specific time periods
Analytics platforms requiring user-driven range selection for data filtering
ai_summary: An Airbnb-styled interactive area chart component featuring a draggable brush for selecting and zooming into time-series data ranges. Built with @visx/visx, it displays stock data with gradient-filled areas, pattern-based brush styling, and axis controls. The component supports both desktop and mobile platforms with a warm purple/pink color scheme typical of Airbnb's design language.
